description_long: This is a classic detached bungalow surrounded by a well-defined yard and a perimeter of evenly spaced trees. The house features a dark, gabled roof and a symmetrical facade with a central entrance, flanked by windows. A paved driveway leads up to the property, connecting to a main road, and there is a small garden area with shrubs and a prominent tree near the entrance. The landscaping is neat, with a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The structure appears to be constructed primarily of wood and masonry, with glass windows and a shingled roof. The overall setting suggests a suburban or residential neighborhood environment.
description: A detached bungalow with a dark gabled roof, central entrance, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by a landscaped yard and a perimeter of trees.
description_view_0: Aerial view showing the front yard, driveway, and the main entrance of the bungalow, with a clear view of the tree-lined perimeter.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, additional trees, and the back facade of the bungalow with fewer visible windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, the side garden, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading up to the house.
